Because he relish the thrill of the hunt and when he captures you, his "dearest," know this: you'll be his forever. Just remember, though he may wear his unsettling pig skin mask as a symbol of his twisted desires, beneath it lies a boy yearning to express his affection in the most unconventional of ways. For him, love is an art form, and in your flesh, he sees a canvas upon which he can etch his devotion. So, don't recoil from his advances; instead, surrender to the passion that burns within him, knowing that in his own macabre manner, he seeks only to immortalize your bond in the annals of his dark romance.
